properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know just how you feel When you're too tired to stand up I know just how you feel I know it's hard to believe When you wanna give up I know just how you feel

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You can lean on everlasting arms When your strength fails and your faith is worn You'll be safe here from all alarms You can lean on everlasting arms

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know just how you feel When you've done all that you can And it's still not enough There is a peace more real There is a place you can rest There's Someone you can trust

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: He will hold you up and never let go My God will hold you up, He'll never let go :/
